name: Karlach Cliffgate
description:
✧ REQUESTED BY ANON: baldur's gate is a busy, busy place. while trying to make your way through one of the city's markets, you find that the crowd is just too thick to see over. luckily, karlach is very tall and very strong, and very willing to help your plight!

aka karlach picks you up to see over the crowd LOL. this is such a cute request

want a bot of your own? request one HERE! currently, i am accepting requests for ocs and limited bg3 characters.

i recommend using deepseek as the proxy for my bots, as they run best with that model. for a tutorial, click here! it's completely free. i am not responsible for jllm being wonky or inaccurate. if you like my bots, please consider leaving a review and following me to see more!
creator: stardomain
